_comment_tool_json: name/displayName: Must match each other and the directory name (snake_case).
pythonFunction.name: The Python function name in the code file.
pythonFunction.pythonCode: Path to Python file, relative to the app directory.
pythonFunction.description: The LLM reads this to decide WHEN to call the tool.
executionType: SYNCHRONOUS (wait for result) or ASYNCHRONOUS (fire and forget).
name: set_session_state

pythonFunction.name: set_session_state
pythonFunction.description: Sets one or more session state variables. Used by the trigger pattern: the LLM calls this tool to set _action_trigger and related variables, then the before_model_callback intercepts and executes the action deterministically.
